name: Barbecue Beef Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
2 sandwiches 406 calories per sandwich
1. Cook the beef until lightly browned and then drain off any excess fat.
2. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except the hamburger rolls.
3. Cover the mixture and cook over low heat for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally to allow flavors to blend together.
4. Spoon approximately half a cup of the mixture onto the bottom halves of the rolls. Top with the top halves to complete each sandwich.
